Definition: As of July 1, 2024: The first day of the most recently completed month in the aggregate. For example, in early July customers will receive a file with date_aggregate: 2024-06-01, representing global index aggregates over April, May, and June time frames combined (rolling quarter). Prior to July 1, 2024: The first day of the month reported
The indicator for the type of service (e.g. fixed, mobile)
Mean download speed achieved during the time period reported. Measured in megabits per second (Mbps). Available for country-level data only.
Median download speed achieved during the time period reported. Measured in megabits per second (Mbps).
Mean upload speed achieved during the time period reported. Measured in megabits per second (Mbps). Available for country-level data only.
Median upload speed achieved during the time period reported. Measured in megabits per second (Mbps).
Mean latency time achieved during the time period reported. Measured in milliseconds (ms). Available for country-level data only.
Median latency time achieved during the time period reported. Measured in milliseconds (ms).
The mean variance in latency over time which determines the stability of the internet connection. Measured in milliseconds (ms). Available for country-level data only.
The median variance in latency over time which determines the stability of the internet connection. Measured in milliseconds (ms).
Denotes the place type: city or country.
The place name of the city or country.
The Global Index rank based on mean download speed. Available for country-level data only.
The Global Index rank based on median download speed.
The change in mean download rank from the previous reporting period. Available for country-level data only.
The change in median download rank from the previous reporting period.
